strengths: 20+ years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum with demonstrated breadth
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and actively maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs, showing product ownership end-to-end
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq signals active pivot toward agentic/AI tooling, with builder fluency intact
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward) — the role demands recognized, demonstrated AI leadership with shipped AI products or platforms, not early-stage exposure

No evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advisory, cross-org technical influence, or public AI thought leadership (talks and workshops are tactical/introductory rather than visionary)
No graduate degree in an AI-related field, and the undergraduate CS degree listed as MIT (2009–2012) overlaps with other concurrent employment, raising timeline credibility questions
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and a long career, but the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring deep, demonstrable AI expertise and the credibility to advise large strategic customers — neither of which is substantiated by the resume. His AI work is nascent (one role, started 2025), his public presence is workshop/open-source level rather than industry-recognized, and there is no indication of the cross-organizational influence or cloud-platform scale the position demands. He could be a strong candidate for a senior or staff IC role in an AI-adjacent product team, but is not yet positioned for a principal AI strategy function at this seniority.
